extortion.description: Hrvatska kovnica novca specializes in the production of circulating and commemorative coins, as well as gold and silver medals and medals made from base metals. The company offers a wide range of products available for purchase through its webshop, catering both to retail and wholesale customers. Their products are particularly suited for special occasions such as weddings, graduations, and religious ceremonies, making them ideal gifts. As a respected institution, they contribute to the national identity and economy of Croatia.
